## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` · `npm run typecheck` · `npm test` · `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated where merge/discovery logic changed
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/*` | `fix/*` | `chore/*` | `docs/*` | `refactor/*`
